## Summary

- Describe the main change
- Link the issue or context if applicable

## Testing

- [ ] `go test ./...`
- [ ] `make test`
- [ ] I updated docs or examples when behavior changed

## Checklist

- [ ] Changelog updated if this affects a release-facing feature or fix
- [ ] New config, flags, or workflows are documented
- [ ] I did not include secrets or generated artifacts
